case_title: ISMARA MENDOZA VS. THOMAS D HARVEY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,472.06 FILED BY MENDOZA, ISMARA AS TO DEFENDANT HARVEY, THOMAS D ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, ISMARA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-26-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-06-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT HARVEY, THOMAS D
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, ISMARA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, ISMARA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HARVEY, THOMAS D DEFENDANT NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR PLAINTIFF'S LOSS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 60.00 SERVED APR-30-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HARVEY, THOMAS D
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY MENDOZA, ISMARA HARVEY, THOMAS D
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-26-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
